creator: william.franck@sterna.io
text:
Hi,

have same problem with FreeBSd 7.2-amd64 and FreeBSd 8.0-RC1/RC2-amd64
on MSI K9N-SLI (nvidia 570 MCP55 SLI) with AMD 6000 X2 and 2G
only 1 SATA drive (Seagate 7200.12 750 Gb)

FreeBSd 7.2-i386 trap on install DVD and
FreeBSd 8.0-RC1/RC2-i386 impossible to correctly define Labels with  
sysinstall on the DVD.

Tried almost 10 combinations of partitions, slices , etc ...  on each  
8.0-i386 and -amd64.

Same  odd file corruptions.
Can not event buildworld , buildkernel 8.0 compiled, but installkernel  
gave up on some files.

Completely stuck with that motherboard :(
By the way, did DOS memtest for a night : OK
Did an install on the same drive of WinXP-SP2 install with Raid  
drivers (F6) was OK.
